  "findings": [
    "Flat or horizontal vent piping installed below the flood level rim of the fixture served."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route the vent piping to rise vertically to a point at least 6 inches above the flood level rim of the fixture before turning horizontal."
  ],
  "rationale": "Plumbing codes (IPC and UPC) strictly prohibit horizontal vent piping below the flood level rim of the fixture because a drain blockage could cause waste to back up into the vent line, clogging it permanently and rendering the vent inoperable.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 905.5",
    "UPC Section 905.3"
  ]
}
